meta.note: Terraria/Type Night – 4x image set for LOTR typing game. Run copy_assets_to_public.ps1 after generation.

Generate 50 original fantasy location names for a typing game set in a LOTR-style world. Output a JSON array of objects with format: {"name": "string", "description": "string"}. Use harsh consonants and a mystical feel. Avoid common fantasy clichés. No copyrighted names. See docs/ART_STYLE_GUIDE.md for tone.
